Craig K. Martin, Esq. of 245-2300, for plaintiffs and moving party
Jonathan T. Rodriguez, Esq. of SEDGWICK, DETERT 781-7900, for defendants and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court heard PLAINTIFF CONSTANCE HENDERSON, ind. and as Guardian ad Litem for Minors: Davonte Braud, Dimitra Braud and Sharell Neal's (Ccp 473.5) Motion To Reconsider The Order Sustaining The Demurrer & Motion To Strike. The Court ordered stricken plaintiff's second amended complaint. Only causes of action 1, 2, 3 and 6 remain.
